emails.subject: Re: Reference credits
emails.body: Lori here is the initial "wish list" from the credit derivatives people. If you can focus on these first and let me know about them I'd appreciate it. Forwarded by Mark Taylor/HOU/ECT on 03/06/2000 03:21 PM David Forster 03/05/2000 12:46 PM

emails.subject: Re: Reference credits
emails.body: Lori here is the initial "wish list" from the credit derivatives people. If you can focus on these first and let me know about them I'd appreciate it. Forwarded by Mark Taylor/HOU/ECT on 03/06/2000 03:21 PM David Forster 03/05/2000 12:46 PM

emails.subject: Re: Reference credits
emails.body: On the attached wish list, of the US companies only, the ones that cannot be approved until I get additional info are: Baltimore Gas Electric, Lucent Technologies, Monsanto, Sun Microsystems, Union Carbide and Viacom. I will get additional ones to you Weds am.
